base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of weapons_items_ui — a ui from 1998 metal gear solid. Weapons (SOCOM/FAMAS/Nikita/Stinger/C4) + items (Box/Mine Detector/Thermal Goggles). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
